final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [3:0] address,
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire read_enable,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] invalid_memory [15:0]; // 16 entries of 16-bit invalid_memory

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            invalid_memory[address] <= data_in; // Write data to invalid_memory
        end
        if (read_enable) begin
            data_out <= invalid_memory[address]; // Read data from invalid_memory
        end
    end
endmodule
